title: orobanche cicerbitae
intro: Orobanche cicerbitae, also known as the Cicerbita broomrape, is a parasitic plant species that belongs to the Broomrape family (Orobanchaceae) and attaches itself to the roots of its host plant for nutrition. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and its extracts have been found to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Orobanche cicerbitae include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and relieving coughs and colds. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
